rows: Per old sheed: Vision of the Ever-Lidded Eye (Necromancy 3 Ritual) : "Consuming both eyes, both thumbs, and the liver of the corpse grants insight to what the spirit is seeing now (or if moved on what it saw at death), where it is now, and in what condition it is in."

Per old sheet: Child Skull Fetter (Ash Path 1 Power) - "It grants to a Necromancer (Trained or Bloodline) the power of Ash Path 1. This does not train the person in it (not a +1 item), only lets them use the lvl 1 power. Item must be in your possesion to use the power."
Rented a medium sized cold storage unit.  Essentially a meat locker. Location in Whittier needs to be defined.
Patric is listed as the Approving Staffer, Charlotte is the CC

Body: Alice collected a body during the confusion happening earlier this month when Downtown was attacked and the Nos were leaving. She did not go close to the action to get hurt. This body will be kept in her cold storage unit from last months resources spend for future use.

Alice will investigate for any anomalies or threats within the Malkavian new territory re general occult activity or Sabbat activity, especially to identify any pack members in the area. (1 DT) (Please advise if it is better to use her occult knowledge  + investigate  or Ally: Grim Legion for this) Create a zombie/zombies if defense is needed (1 DT) There is no apparent Sabbat activity however there is a little occult shop she finds that has something to it. Spirits around it can feel it has real power.
Attempt parle with the Giovanni in the area (or Seraphina if she cannot contact more immediate residents (1 DT) Submit a ticket
Herd (of my own) (no downtimes) Yay fed
Alice will investigate the occult shop in Malkavian territory for anything unusual.
Dark Assistant (Skull) - Alice will spend a downtime to create one
1 DT - Send a silver dagger with a black ribbon around it anonymously to Seraphina Giovanni via Ansul's instructions.
Herd (of my own) (no downtimes) Yay fed

Alice would like to learn more about her new retainers abilities to figure out how best to utilize him. (Wraith Retainer - Note: I haven't received the full detailed stats of his skills yet. Alice has wraith lore, investigate,  and occult 4, but that doesn't apply to deeper knowledge of arcanoi she has not encountered. This may involve NPC interaction)
Alice would like to travel to Filipinotown to meet with the wraiths from the Sea with No Suns and see what she can find. She hopes to gain more allies.

1 DT (or Free since this is a retainer action?)=Alice will be assisting with the surveillance of the Brujah rant (with her retainer probably, not Grim Legion) and haven tracking/crashing. 1 DT=Alice will be assisting the Sea with No Sun by defending against/attacking Dark Jade Kingdom wraiths near their territory (Historic Filipinotown).  1 DT = Moving the weapons to the Grim Legion (may need Ansul's help)
Strength of Rotten Flesh ( 4 level Necromancy Ritual); 1 Fortitude
Strength of Rotten Flesh ( 8 XP) Fortitude 1 (4 XP)

Investigate/research pit problem in Downey and it's relation to the shroud & hopefullu learn more info using tribal magic lore, wraith lore, and occult 4 (2 DT). Alice has a little knowledge from RP really Book of Nod and has been shown Durrikens visions.
Rico (Eric Paul) to map known locations of Citadels, haunts, and dragons nest where wraith are in domain
Interrogate NPM wrsith in basement (1 DT)
1 DT - Investigate South Bay Defenses for Weaknesses that can be exploited by Wraith/Zombies
Retainer - Send Rico to find out what the legions know re the Demons
1 DT - Alice would like to contact the Sea with No Sun regarding the Kool Aid Man incident in the latest News on the March.
Retainer Action - Have Rico patrol to identify wraith or supernatural threats in the area where the Malkavian Havens are located (primarily whittier)
1 DT - Interrogate Jessica Lee (NPM wraith) (Eric Paul)
1 DT - Recon for Operation Smash and Grab, 1 DT - Attack for Operation Smash and Grab (if it goes forward after recon) (Patric)
1 DT Defense of Montebello/Whittier; 1 DT Investigation of Whittier/Montebello (Defense rating)
Grim Legion - Alice will ask them if they have a file on her sire and what it contains;  Rico (Retainer) - Keep an eye out for anyone who may be investigating Alice and report
Alice would have learned this from torturing Jessica Lee (Eric Paul)
